BOOKEND: 15-min stretch → 1:00 dead hang (floor: 1:00 plank) → main → 1:00 dead hang (floor: 1:00 plank)

SPRINTS.title: Floor Exercises
SPRINTS.goal: Ground strength, scapular + hip control, eggbeater-ready trunk stiffness.

weekA.label: Week 1 — Teach / Load
weekA.intent: Own positions. Clean tempo. Leave 2–3 reps in reserve.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: World’s Greatest Stretch, 90/90 Hips, Thoracic Openers, Shoulder CARs (5/side)

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: Shoulder CARs, Band Dislocates Light, Pec Wall Stretch, World’s Greatest Stretch

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: 90/90, Pigeon, World’s Greatest Stretch, Calf Wall Stretch

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Cat-Cow, Thread-the-Needle, Hip Openers, Shoulder CARs

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: World’s Greatest Stretch Circuit, CARs, Light Hip Openers, Bear Crawl Practice

finisher.eq: Field: 5 Rounds — 10m Shuffle L/R + 10m Sprint + Walk 30s
finisher.floor: Floor: 5 Rounds — Bear Crawl 20s + Crab Walk 20s + Rest 30s

weekB.label: Week 2 — Intensify + Power Intro
weekB.intent: Add load/reps and introduce clap push-ups, lateral bounds, and get-ups.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: WGS, Open Book, 90/90, Shoulder CARs (6/side)

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: Longer Pec + Posterior Capsule; CARs Slow; Wall Slides

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Dynamic WGS, Leg Swings, Hip CARs (3/side)

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Cat-Cow, Thread-the-Needle, Hip Openers, Quick CARs

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: Full Flow; Emphasize Quality Hip Flips + CARs

SPRINTS.title: Shoulder Mobility
SPRINTS.goal: Scapular control, ER strength, overhead readiness, throwing durability.

weekA.label: Week 3 — Teach / Load
weekA.intent: Pain-free ranges only. Prefer quality over load on CARs/orbits.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: 10 Min CARs + Pec/Lat Wall Stretches + World’s Greatest Stretch (5/side)

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: CARs, Open Book, Sleeper Stretch Gentle, Hip Openers

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Long CARs; Posterior Capsule; Lat Stretch; Neck CARs (3/side)

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Hips + Light Shoulder CARs Only (Recovery Bias)

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: Full Shoulder Series 15 Min (CARs, WGS, Wall Slides, Sleeper)

finisher.floor: Floor: 4 Rounds — Bear Crawl + Crab Walk

weekB.label: Week 4 — Intensify + Overhead Strength
weekB.intent: Y-press, Z-press, hanging work, denser CARs — keep CARs slow.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: CARs + Pec/Lat + WGS + Open Book

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: WGS, CARs, Hip Flexor Stretch, Thoracic Openers

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Extra Time on Sleeper + Lat + Band Dislocates + Wrist CARs

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Hips Primary; Light CARs Only; Hip CARs 3/side

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: Full Shoulder Series + WGS + Neck CARs

SPRINTS.title: Hip Mobility
SPRINTS.goal: Open hips, single-leg strength, eggbeater/kick drive transfer.

weekA.label: Week 5 — Teach / Load
weekA.intent: Own deep hip positions; Bulgarian depth before load; introduce Copenhagens.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: 90/90 Flow, Pigeon, World’s Greatest Stretch, Frog Stretch, Hip CARs (3/side)

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: WGS + CARs + Hip Flexor Wall Stretch

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Long 90/90 + Adductor Rock-Backs + Pigeon

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Dynamic WGS, Leg Swings, CARs Quick, Bear Crawl

finisher.eq: Field: 6 Rounds — 5m Shuffle + 10m Sprint + 5 High Knees
finisher.floor: Floor: 6 Rounds — Bear Crawl 20s + Crab Walk 20s

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: 15-Min Hip-Only Flow (90/90, Pigeon, Frog, WGS) + Full Hip CARs

weekB.label: Week 6 — Intensify + Lateral / Single-Leg
weekB.intent: More unilateral + lateral volume; denser hip flips; Copenhagens up.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: Same Hip Flow; Longer End-Range Holds; Hip CARs

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: WGS + CARs + Hip Flexors + Open Book

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Adductor + 90/90 Emphasis + Calf

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Dynamic Hips + Quick CARs

finisher.eq: Field: 8 COD Rounds (Shuffle + Sprint + High Knees)

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: Full Hip Flow 15 Min + Light CARs + Stick Stretch

eq.name: Stick Complex: Good Morning + Squat + Chop

floor.name: Good Morning + Air Squat + Reach Chop

SPRINTS.title: Core Burnout
SPRINTS.goal: Anti-rotation, anti-extension, rotational power, high-density trunk work.

weekA.label: Week 7 — Teach / Load
weekA.intent: Brace quality first. Stop a set early if lumbar extends.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: Cat-Cow, Dead Bug Prep, WGS, CARs

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: Shoulder CARs + Open Book + Hollow Prep

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Hip Openers + Hollow/Rock Prep

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Short Dynamic Only (8–10 Min Quality Inside the 15)

eq.name: KB Core Circuit: Sides + Semicircles + Overs + Chops

sessions.notes: Density day. Rest exactly as written.

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: WGS + CARs + Light Hip Openers

weekB.label: Week 8 — Intensify + Rotational Emphasis
weekB.intent: Shorter rests, hanging windshield wipers, harder burnout density.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: Cat-Cow, WGS, CARs, Hollow Prep

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: CARs + Open Book + Sleeper Gentle

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Hips + Brace Prep + Adductor

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Brief Dynamic Stretch

eq.name: KB Core Circuit: Sides + Semicircles + Overs + Chops

sessions.notes: Hardest core day before peak sprint. Deload a round if form breaks.

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: WGS + CARs + Hip Flips Slow

SPRINTS.title: World’s Most Difficult 2 Weeks
SPRINTS.goal: Peak density, complexity, and conditioning — still recoverable if form rules are followed.

weekA.label: Week 9 — Peak Density
weekA.intent: Hardest volume/density. Drop a round if technique fails. Sleep 8+ hrs.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: Compressed but Complete: CARs, WGS, 90/90, Hip Flips Slow
sessions.notes: Deload cue: if last rep ugly, end the set.

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: Long CARs + WGS + Pec/Lat

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Hip Flow Heavy (90/90, Pigeon, Frog, WGS) + Hip CARs

finisher.eq: Field: 8 Rounds — 10m Shuffle + 15m Sprint + 10s High-Knee Hold

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Brace + CARs Only
sessions.notes: Optional 4th round cut if grip/core fails early.

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: Dynamic Full-Body 15 Min (WGS, CARs, Leg Swings, Bear Crawl)

finisher.eq: Field: 10-Min EMOM — Odd: 20m Sprint; Even: 8 Burpees (Sprawls OK)
finisher.floor: Floor: 10-Min EMOM — Odd: 30 Climbers; Even: 8 Sprawls

weekB.label: Week 10 — Peak Complexity
weekB.intent: Same brutality + different complex sequences from your notes. Still stop for broken form.

sessions.label: Day 1
sessions.stretch: Full Must-Do Flow Including WGS + CARs + Hip Flips

sessions.label: Day 2
sessions.stretch: Shoulder Resilience Block (CARs, Sleeper, Pec/Lat, WGS, Wrist CARs)

sessions.label: Day 3
sessions.stretch: Hip Mobility Peak + Full Hip CARs

finisher.eq: Field: 10 COD Rounds (Shuffle + Sprint + High-Knee Hold)

sessions.label: Day 4
sessions.stretch: Minimal — Earn the Hang/Plank Bookends

eq.name: KB Core Circuit: Sides + Semicircles + Overs + Chops

sessions.notes: Last hard day. Cut volume 20% if shoulders/hips complain.

sessions.label: Day 5
sessions.stretch: Victory Lap Mobility — Still Full 15 Min

eq.name: Stick Complex: Good Morning + Squat + Chop

floor.name: Good Morning + Air Squat + Reach Chop

finisher.eq: Field Capstone: 12-Min EMOM — Odd Sprint 20m; Even 10 Sprawls + 5 Hip Flips/Side
finisher.floor: Floor Capstone: 12-Min EMOM — Odd 40 Climbers; Even 10 Sprawls + 5 Hip Flips/Side
